title: 3 Blue-Chip Stocks That Just Have No More Hope Left
text: Investors love blue-chip stocks for their safety and stability. Ideally, they provide strong dividends from well-known firms with strong business models that fare well in market downturns.

title: 2 Stocks in Daniel Loeb's Portfolio Approach 52-Week Lows
text: While the market continues to contend with a potential recession as the first half of the year prepares to come to a close in a few weeks, a couple stocks in Daniel Loeb (Trades, Portfolio)'s equity portfolio have retreated near their 52-week lows.

title: International Flavors (IFF) Divests Savory Solutions Business
text: International Flavors & Fragrances (IFF) divests its underperforming Savory Solutions Group and intends to utilize the proceeds to lower debt levels.
